creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hugo,

I've made some additional changes to your port.  Please review and let
me know if I have your approval to commit.

Summary:

- Install examples conditional on NOPORTEXAMPLES (not NOPORTDOCS)
- Remove MANCOMPRESSED=no since it is default
- Remove redundant installation of manpages (they are already installed
  by upstream)
- I removed the creation of ${ETCDIR}; this was done conditional on
  NOPORTDOCS; is that necessary?  Please let me know.
- Utilize PORTDOCS and PORTEXAMPLES so we do not have to include them in
  pkg-plist.

Thanks,
-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org>
